title: crassothonna discoidea
intro: Crassothonna discoidea, also known as the disco daisies or Cape daisy, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Crassothonna discoidea include treating fever, sore throats, and digestive issues, as well as being used as a wound treatment. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or infused in oil to be used topically or ingested, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
